title: Intense Nutty Filipino Chicken Adobo
description: A kid-friendly Filipino dish featuring liquid cheese and beurre-monte, this intense nutty chicken adobo is a diabetic-friendly twist on a classic recipe, with a velvety sauce and a rich nutty flavor.
instructions: Heat the peanut oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the chicken thighs and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the soy sauce, vinegar, bay leaves, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Stir in the liquid cheese and beurre-monte until the sauce is smooth and velvety.
Continue to simmer for an additional 10 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve the chicken and sauce over rice or noodles, garnished with chopped green onions if desired.
